entries.notes:
Atlas 1.4 is here, a bigger update with a few features we've been excited to ship!

• Real-time collaborative notes. Invite someone to edit a note with you and see changes instantly. No refreshing, no sending. Collaborative notes are included with Premium, and anyone you invite can collaborate for free.

• Focus is now free. Timed sessions, soundscapes, streaks, and statistics are now available to everyone. App Blocking and Flow Sessions remain Premium.

• More languages. Atlas is now available in German, French, and Italian, bringing the app to six supported languages.

• Plus plenty of polish. A redesigned onboarding experience, larger note text, a clearer Face ID lock for private notes, and lots of improvements and bug fixes throughout the app.

Thanks for using Atlas!

Atlas 1.3 makes your day flow better:

• Focus, simplified: pick 15, 30, 45 or 60 minutes, or tap ∞ for an open-ended flow session. All on one screen.
• Completed tasks now appear on the day you completed them, so your history reflects what actually happened.
• Overdue tasks are clearly flagged everywhere, including on their original day.
• A beautiful new welcome tour greets new members.
• Cleaner tags in Browse, our updated logo on every screen, and polish throughout.

Questions or ideas? Reach out from Settings. Happy focusing!

• A guided welcome tour to get you started.
• A completely rebuilt Settings, cleaner and easier to navigate.
• Calming soundscapes for your focus sessions.
• Home Screen widgets that jump straight into Atlas.
• A new in-app Help and FAQ.
• Atlas Premium is here for the deeper features.
Atlas launches on the App Store: tasks, notes, a daily journal, and focus sessions, together in one calm app that syncs across your devices.
